questionHtml: Outline how the decay constant of potassium-40 was determined in the laboratory for a pure sample of the nuclide.
markschemeHtml:
«use the mass of the sample to» determine number of potassium-40 atoms / nuclei in sample ✓

«use a counter to» determine (radio)activity / A of sample ✓

use A = λN «to determine the decay constant / λ» ✓

meta.title: Outline how the decay constant of potassium-40 was determined in the laboratory for a pure sample of the nuclide.
